retrieved_result: Ibaraki Prefecture Ibaraki Prefecture is located along the eastern coastline of the main island of Honshu in the Kanto region. The capital city of Ibaraki Prefecture is Mito, which is famous for Kairakuen, one of the Three Great Gardens of Japan. Guides & Articles View all No listings found which match your selection.
